name: aNANt
description: India's first computational materials database — 23,000+ MXenes with optimized structures and electronic properties for ML training.

name: VirTex
description: Python package for virtual texture analysis from atomistic microstructures: orientation relationships, misorientations, Schmid factors.

name: JARVIS-Leaderboard
description: Official contributor to NIST's benchmarking platform for materials science ML methods and AI models.

name: URSA
description: Contributor to LANL's Universal Research and Scientific Agent — an AI-powered research assistant for scientific discovery.
